name: Ruben Burgers
recipeIngredient: 4 1/2 oz Corned Beef Spread; 1 can, OR
recipeInstructions:
Each cheese slice should be approximately 3 inches by 3 inches.
~------------------------------------------------------
~----------------- Mix all the ingredients together except the sauerkraut and cheese. Shape the mixture into five patties, each about 3/4-inch thick. Set the oven control to broil or 550 degrees F. Broil the patties 4 inches from the heat, turning once, until they reach the desired doneness, about 10 to 15 minutes. Top each patty with sauerkraut and a cheese slice. Continue broiling until the cheese is melted and lightly browned in color. Serve on toasted rye or pumpernickel buns or bread.
